recommendations.title: My Father's Violin
recommendations.overview: Through their shared grief and connection to music, an orphaned girl bonds with her emotionally aloof, successful violinist uncle.

recommendations.title: Orchestra Class
recommendations.overview: A violinist looks to inspire his students at a challenging music school.

recommendations.title: The Anthem of the Heart
recommendations.overview: A young girl had her voice magically taken away so that she would never hurt people with it, but her outlook changes when she encounters music and friendship. Will Naruse be able to convey the anthem of her heart?

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: From Me to You
recommendations.overview: Sawako Kuronuma looks miserable on the outside, but is actually a positive-minded girl, who looks up to Shota Kazehaya, a sociable and friendly boy. Perceiving Sawako's good intentions, he secretly has feelings for her. Sawako meets Kazehaya and make

recommendations.title: Entergalactic
recommendations.overview: Ambitious artist Jabari attempts to balance success and love when he moves into his dream Manhattan apartment and falls for his next-door neighbor.

recommendations.title: 5 Centimeters per Second
recommendations.overview: Three moments in Takaki's life: his relationship with Akari and their forced separation; his friendship with Kanae, who is secretly in love with him; the demands and disappointments of adulthood, an unhappy life in a cold city.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: Eating Out
recommendations.overview: After getting dumped by his slutty girlfriend, Caleb falls in love with Gwen. However, thanks to Caleb's roommate, Gwen thinks he's gay and sets him up with her roommate, Marc.
